jobType.name: REST API
jobType.description: Import OpenAPIs individually or in bulk. One time only or sync with a source.
jobType.metadata: {"files":[{"purpose":"INPUT","filetypesAllowed":["yaml","yml","json"],"canUpload":true,"canDownload":true,"visualStyle":"basicFileChooser","removeOnCompleted":true,"cardinality":"1","storage":{"location":"VAULT","tag":"InputFile","filename":"FILENAME"}},{"purpose":"OUTPUT","filetypesAllowed":["yml","json"],"canUpload":false,"canDownload":true,"visualStyle":"basicFileDownload","removeOnCompleted":false,"cardinality":"1","storage":{"location":"VAULT","tag":"OutputFile","filename":"FILENAME"}},{"purpose":"ERROR","filetypesAllowed":["yml","json"],"canUpload":false,"canDownload":true,"visualStyle":"basicFileDownload","removeOnCompleted":false,"cardinality":"1","storage":{"location":"VAULT","tag":"ErrorFile","filename":"FILENAME"}},{"purpose":"FAIL","filetypesAllowed":["yml","json"],"canUpload":false,"canDownload":true,"visualStyle":"basicFileDownload","removeOnCompleted":false,"cardinality":"1","storage":{"location":"VAULT","tag":"FailedFile","filename":"FILENAME"}}],"fields":[{"label":"Owner","description":"","visualStyle":"{
